chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6471 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho PRIORITY CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.11439/2022. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For hearing of CMA No.27796/2020. 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 7th September 2023 Mr. Ghulam Akbar Lashari, Advocate for SBCA. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, Asst. A.G. Sindh. -*-*-*-*-*- Petitioner is called absent, no intimation is received. On the last date of hearing also, petitioner was called absent and in the interest of justice matter was adjourned. Instant petition is pending since 15.12.2020, however, without any useful progress, whereas, no one on behalf of the petitioner has come forward to proceed with it, which shows petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed on account of non- prosecution alongwith listed / pending applications. However, the SBCA authorities are at liberty to proceed against any illegal and unauthorized construction, if being raised in violation of Karachi Building and Town Planning Regulations, 2002, and against approved building plan on the subject plot after notice to all concerned in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
